pattern: Two-pass column scan: first find the column maximum ignoring -1 cells, then replace each -1 in that column with the precomputed maximum.
hints: Each column is handled independently; the maximum needed for replacements is the max of all non-negative values in that column.
Compute column maximums in one pass, then substitute -1 values in a second pass using the stored max.
The problem guarantees each column has at least one non-negative value, so the replacement maximum always exists.

edge_inputs.description: entire column except one cell is -1
max in column is 0, -1 replaced by 0
